problem id: 0201e198
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  01010111 -> 10111010
  11100010 -> 00010111
  00111100 -> 11100001
  00001110 -> 01110000
  10000111 -> 00111100
  10111000 -> 11000101
  10100110 -> 00110101
  00101110 -> 01110001
  01011001 -> 11001010

query: 10111110
predicted answer: 11110101
